title: wolfhsm-sys: wolfhsm_aes_gcm_encrypt allows NULL tag (unauthenticated output)
description: wolfhsm_aes_gcm_encrypt() accepts tag=NULL and passes enc_tag=NULL to wh_Client_AesGcm. wh_Client_AesGcm does not validate enc_tag for encryption path. A caller passing NULL tag gets ciphertext with no authentication tag — the AES-GCM authentication guarantee is silently lost. Add: if (tag == NULL) return WH_ERROR_BADARGS; at the top of the encrypt shim.
